zh.Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay於大約1242年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊時，她的父親Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles74歲，母親Beatrix Stewart46歲。她於大約1260年與Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1272年在蘇格蘭享年32歲。

zh-hans.Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay于大约1242年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊时，她的父亲Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles74岁，母亲Beatrix Stewart46岁。她于大约1260年与Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1272年在苏格兰享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of names such as   Leonora   and   Honora  , also used as an independent given name. At one time it was regarded as a peculiarly Irish name (  see  Nóra   ).

variants.name: Norah
meanings: Short form of names such as   Leonora   and   Honora  , also used as an independent given name. At one time it was regarded as a peculiarly Irish name (  see  Nóra   ).

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay was born about 1242, in Islay, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, was 74 and her mother, Beatrix Stewart, was 46. She married Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh about 1260, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1272, in Scotland, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay est née environ 1242, à Islay, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, avait 74 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Stewart, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh environ 1260, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1272, à Écosse, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay um 1242 in Islay, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles 74 und ihre Mutter Beatrix Stewart 46. Sie hat um 1260 in Scotland Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1272 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay è nata il circa 1242 nel Islay, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, aveva 74 anni e sua madre, Beatrix Stewart, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh circa 1260, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1272, nel Scotland, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mora Mor MacDonald of Islayが約1242年にスコットランドアルグイルイスレイで生まれた時，父Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Islesは74歳，母Beatrix Stewartは46歳であった。約1260年にスコットランドでFerquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintoshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1272年にスコットランドで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay(이)가 대략 1242년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles(은)는 74세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Stewart(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 대략 1260년 스컷랜드에서 Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1272년 스컷랜드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1242–about 1272: tany ho any amin'ny 1242–tany ho any amin'ny 1272

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay nasceu aproximadamente 1242, em Islay, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, tinha 74 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Stewart, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh aproximadamente 1260, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1272, em Scotland, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay родилась около 1242 г. в местности ислеи, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles было 74 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Stewart, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh около 1260 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1272 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay nació aproximadamente 1242, en Islay, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, tenía 74 años y su mamá, Beatrix Stewart, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh aproximadamente 1260, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1272, en Scotland, a la edad de 32 años.
